name: breath-art-institute
description: Breath Art - Complete AI course platform with video player

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" --names frontend,backend --prefix-colors cyan,yellow
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install:all:prod: npm ci && cd frontend && npm ci && cd ../backend && npm ci
